oh-my-codex.name: Oh My Codex
oh-my-codex.description: Routes OmX coding steps through Codex/Claude/Gemini CLI workers instead of Claude SDK specialists. Workers run in tmux panes and persist independently, solving the ~50% specialist death rate.

OMX_CODEX_AGENT_TYPE.description: Default agent type: codex | claude | gemini

clawhip.name: Clawhip
clawhip.description: Discord bridge for agent lifecycle events. Posts color-coded embeds to #mission-control when specialists spawn, complete, fail, or crash.
